source_notes: Statcast overlay refreshed at 6 AM ET. Season + 30 day rolling for probable starters and season + 15 day rolling for top 5 batters per team via MLB Stats API. Statcast pitch level fields (xwOBA, barrel %, exit velo) require Baseball Savant scrape and are nulled in this morning build; downstream skills can hydrate before slate lock. Yesterday box scores were pulled and every appearing player was refreshed before today set built.
lineup_endpoint_note: Lineup endpoint returned empty player arrays for all 6 games at 6 AM ET, which is expected pregame behavior. Probable pitchers were obtained from MLB schedule probablePitcher hydrate. Top 5 batters per team were drawn from yesterday's box score batting order (positions 1-5) as a projection for today's lineup; no probable pitcher fallback was required.
fallbacks_used: Top 5 batters per team projected from yesterday's batting order (slots 1 through 5)
matchups: Los Angeles Angels (Brent Suter) at Cleveland Guardians (Joey Cantillo) — Progressive Field
